title: The Last Summer We Spoke — The Letter
atmospheric_profile: kitchen table close-up: two glasses of iced tea, stack of old photographs, single handwritten letter with visible text 'I should have come home sooner...', lace curtain light, dust motes, quiet tenderness and time
quality_notes: Masterful emotional micro-storytelling. The visible letter text, iced tea, and light through lace create unbearable tenderness. Highest quality intimate drama still.
